overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a desert canyon environment with red rock formations, accompanied by a small creature companion. The character walks through varying terrain from rocky paths to sandy canyon floors, eventually approaching a large crashed starship structure identified as the Garrison Ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with towering rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky canyon toward the tall spire formation ahead

notable_agents.action: small dark creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation rising prominently from the canyon floor
reddish-brown cliff face with layered rock strata
reddish-brown cliff face forming the canyon boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert canyon with towering red rock walls on both sides. A distinctive tall spire formation dominates the center view ahead, while a small creature follows behind. The ground is rocky and uneven under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with sandy floor

events.description: canyon walls close in and ground transitions from rocky terrain to soft sand

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path through the increasingly narrow canyon

notable_agents.action: creature continuing to follow through the narrow sandy passage

entered.detail: sparse low-lying desert vegetation growing along the canyon edge

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly with walls closing in on both sides. The ground becomes sandy and soft underfoot. The tall spire from the previous section disappears behind as the path winds deeper into the rock formations, with sparse bushes visible along the edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon clearing with crashed starship wreckage

events.description: massive crashed starship becomes visible in the canyon ahead
location discovery notification appears for Garrison Ruins

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive crashed starship structure in the clearing

notable_agents.action: creature following as the character approaches the wreckage

entered.detail: massive crashed spacecraft with triangular wing structure embedded in the canyon wall
scattered ancient ruins and debris surrounding the crashed ship

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal the Garrison Ruins, featuring a massive crashed starship with distinctive triangular wings. The character approaches the imposing wreckage as the ground remains sandy. A UI notification confirms the location discovery as the character draws nearer to the ancient ruins surrounding the ship.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a red rock canyon that gradually narrows before opening up to reveal a massive crashed starship. It begins with the character and a small creature traversing a wide, rocky canyon floor under a bright midday sun, moving toward a dominant central spire. As the path winds deeper into the rock formations, the canyon walls close in and the terrain shifts from uneven rock to soft sand, causing the distant spire to disappear from view. The scene then expands as the narrow passage opens into a wide basin, revealing the imposing triangular wings of the Garrison Ruins. The camera continues its forward momentum across the sandy ground, drawing closer to the ancient wreckage as a location notification appears on the screen.
